src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method Environment.acceptsProfiles(String...) is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently; the new API requires Profiles.of() to compile with newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JHipster properties with Spring Boot's standard TaskExecutionProperties for async configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom JHipsterProperties class and its async configuration methods are removed or refactored in newer JHipster versions, causing compilation errors if referenced.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update constructor to inject TaskExecutionProperties instead of JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The constructor signature must match the new field type to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update executor configuration to use TaskExecutionProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old JHipsterProperties.getAsync() methods no longer exist or are incompatible, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update thread name prefix configuration to use TaskExecutionProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old hardcoded string or property access is replaced by the standard Spring Boot property accessor.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for ExceptionHandlingAsyncTaskExecutor to new package.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated TimeUnit-based Duration with java.time.Duration for Ehcache expiry configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old API using org.ehcache.expiry.Duration and TimeUnit is deprecated or removed in newer Ehcache versions compatible with JDK 11, causing compilation errors or runtime warnings.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update JHipster package imports from io.github.jhipster to tech.jhipster.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Without this bean, Hibernate may not correctly use the configured JCache manager, leading to runtime caching issues or errors in newer Hibernate versions.
